bug.description: stale protocol state not cleared after procedure completion or failure

prompt:
There is a stale protocol state not cleared after procedure completion or failure downstream of function _emm_as_cell_info_req in the openair3/NAS/UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/UE/EMM/SAP/emm_as.c:1445.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
